detail: QEMU reached Arm UEFI, but Windows Setup did not start and firmware fell back to the EDK II shell.
nextActions: Confirm the installer ISO is attached as the first bootable USB/CD-ROM device and contains efi/boot/bootaa64.efi.
The smoke run already sent boot prompt key input; inspect the console screenshot before changing the device recipe.
Open the console screenshot and serial log together to compare the visible firmware state with the boot text.
